business.name: A BETTER HANDYMAN LLC
business.tagline: The fix-it crew Virginia Beach calls first

hero.headline: *Four hours* from your call to fixed roof
hero.subheadline: Shannon schedules it, Joe's crew shows up same-day, and your problem gets handled right the first time.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: What breaks, we handle
services_section.subheading: From emergency roof leaks to custom pantry builds — no job too small, no timeline too tight

services.title: Home Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: From fixing leaky faucets to patching drywall, we handle all your home repair needs with professional craftsmanship and attention to detail.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.description: Safe and reliable electrical work including outlet installation, fixture replacement, and troubleshooting electrical issues in your home.

services.title: Plumbing Solutions
services.description: Expert plumbing services for Virginia Beach homes including pipe repairs, fixture installation, and emergency leak fixes.

services.title: Carpentry & Installation
services.description: Custom carpentry work, cabinet installation, trim work, and furniture assembly to enhance your living space.

services.title: Painting & Touch-ups
services.description: Professional interior and exterior painting services to refresh and protect your home's appearance.

about.heading: Joe's crew, Shannon's scheduling
about.body: We're the Virginia Beach handyman team that actually answers the phone. Shannon handles your call with genuine care, Joe's experienced crew shows up when promised, and your project gets done right. From emergency roof repairs to custom carpentry, we've built our reputation on solving problems fast and keeping our word.

reviews.name: Rene S.
reviews.text: Shannon was incredible to work with — showed real empathy when I discovered a critical roof problem just weeks after moving in. Joe's team fixed it fast.

reviews.name: Christina B.
reviews.text: Transformed our unused space into a beautiful walk-in pantry. Exceptional experience from start to finish with A Better Handyman.

reviews.name: Patricia U.
reviews.text: Matt and Rodney came bright and early to replace our rusting iron porch rails with beautiful wooden ones. Professional work all around.

reviews.name: Daniel T.
reviews.text: Same-day service for my leaky roof — fixed within four hours of calling! They even sent before and after photos. Would give six stars if I could.

cta.heading: Your fix is one call away
cta.body: Talk to Shannon, get it scheduled, watch Joe's crew make it right. Same-day service when you need it most.
